title: Khmer Rouge Cambodia
sacredPoliticalOrderName: Khmer Rouge Cambodia sacred political order
sacredPoliticalOrderDefinition: Draft operational shorthand for the durable shared meanings, legitimacy claims, memory, obligation, and sacrifice logic associated with Khmer Rouge Cambodia.
sacredPoliticalOrderStrengthRationale: Provisional scaffold score based on the case outcome category; requires evidence-chain review before scholarly use.
selectionRationale: Included to test the sacrificial-escalation pathway under strong order pressure.
theoryTest: Tests the relationship among sacred-political-order strength, crisis pressure, corrigibility, and sacrifice.
